# Architecture — The Spotter Worksheet (v1.0)
*Generated by tech-lead-review · May 20, 2026*

## Data and Token Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph MCP["MCP Server (Cloudflare Worker)"]
        SGT["spotter_get_template\n(injects __SPOTTER_DATA__)"]
    end

    subgraph Browser["Browser / Cowork Artifact"]
        DATA["window.SPOTTER_DATA\n(meta + areas + notes)"]
        RENDER["renderAll()\nbuildAreaHtml · buildTrackerCell"]
        DOM["Live DOM\n(state machine via data-* attrs)"]
        STATE["setAreaState()\nupdateCounts() · syncTracker()"]

        subgraph AILoop["Iteration Loop (per area)"]
            REFINE["refineWithSpotter()\n— opens iterate editor"]
            CALL["callSpotterAI()\n— builds prompt w/ excerpt + notes context"]
            RERUN["rerunSpotterAI()\n— re-evaluate fresh (no note context ⚠)"]
            APPEND["appendRevision()\n— updates DOM + replaceNotesPane()"]
        end

        subgraph Export["Export"]
            SUMMARY["buildExportHtml / buildExportMd"]
            BLOB["Blob download / window.print()"]
        end

        FONTS["loadFonts()\nMCP warmup_get_fonts → localStorage cache"]
    end

    subgraph Cowork["Cowork Runtime"]
        ASKC["window.cowork.askClaude(prompt, [])\n💰 ~500–1500 tokens per call"]
        FONT_TOOL["window.cowork.callMcpTool(fontToolName)"]
    end

    subgraph Google["External CDN"]
        GF["fonts.googleapis.com\n(fallback if no MCP fonts)"]
    end

    SGT -->|"filled HTML"| DATA
    DATA --> RENDER --> DOM
    DOM --> STATE
    STATE --> DOM

    DOM -->|"user clicks Refine"| REFINE
    REFINE --> CALL
    CALL -->|"prompt: epicTitle + excerpt + open/accepted notes + userNote"| ASKC
    ASKC -->|"JSON: {excerpt, notes[]}"| CALL
    CALL --> APPEND
    APPEND --> DOM

    DOM -->|"user clicks Rerun"| RERUN
    RERUN -->|"prompt: excerpt only (⚠ missing note resolution state)"| ASKC
    ASKC -->|"JSON: {notes[]}"| RERUN
    RERUN --> DOM

    DOM -->|"all areas closed"| SUMMARY
    SUMMARY --> BLOB

    FONTS -->|"tool call"| FONT_TOOL
    FONTS -.->|"CDN fallback"| GF
```

## Token Cost Notes

| Call | Approx tokens | Frequency |
|------|--------------|-----------|
| `callSpotterAI` | ~500–1500 (excerpt + notes + prompt) | Once per user refine action |
| `rerunSpotterAI` | ~300–800 (excerpt + prompt, no notes) | Once per rerun action |
| `callMcpTool (fonts)` | ~5000+ (full font CSS) | Once per session (cached in localStorage) |

## Known Issues (from review)

- `note.type` from LLM responses is inserted into HTML class attributes without validation — XSS risk via prompt injection (High)
- `rerunSpotterAI` sends no note resolution context to the model (Medium)
- Font cache key is `warmup-fonts-v2` — should be a shared or spotter-specific key (Medium)
- `sendBtn` promise chain has no outer `.catch` — UI can freeze on DOM errors (Medium)
- Dead function `getSelectedNotes` references removed `data-selected` attribute (High)
